deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: jupyterhub
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: jupyterhub-4-3-5
      name: jupyterhub
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        jupyterhub:
          ingress:
            enabled: true
            hosts: ['']
    - template: traefik-39-0-8
      name: traefik
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443
    - template: ollama-1-54-0
      name: ollama
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        ollama:
          models:
            pull: [smollm:135m]
            run: [smollm:135m]
    - template: cert-manager-1-20-2
      name: cert-manager
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        cert-manager:
          crds:
            enabled: true
    - template: kserve-crd-v0-18-0
      name: kserve-crd
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: cert-manager
        namespace: jupyterhub
    - template: kserve-resources-v0-18-0
      name: kserve-resources
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: kserve-crd
        namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        kserve-resources:
          kserve:
            controller:
              deploymentMode: Standard # Knative
              gateway:
                disableIstioVirtualHost: true
                disableIngressCreation: true
    - template: kserve-runtime-configs-v0-18-0
      name: kserve-runtime-configs
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: kserve-resources
        namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        kserve-runtime-configs:
          kserve:
            servingruntime:
              enabled: true
    - template: raw-2-0-2
      name: raw
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: kserve-runtime-configs
        namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        raw:
          resources:
          - apiVersion: serving.kserve.io/v1beta1
            kind: InferenceService
            metadata:
              name: sklearn-iris
              namespace: kserve
            spec:
              predictor:
                model:
                  modelFormat:
                    name: sklearn
                  storageUri: gs://kfserving-examples/models/sklearn/1.0/model
                  resources:
                    requests:
                      cpu: "100m"
                      memory: "512Mi"
                    limits:
                      cpu: "1"
                      memory: "1Gi"

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: jupyterhub
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: jupyterhub-4-3-5
      name: jupyterhub
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        jupyterhub:
          ingress:
            enabled: true
            hosts: ['']
    - template: traefik-39-0-8
      name: traefik
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443
    - template: ollama-1-54-0
      name: ollama
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        ollama:
          models:
            pull: [smollm:135m]
            run: [smollm:135m]
    - template: cert-manager-1-20-2
      name: cert-manager
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        cert-manager:
          crds:
            enabled: true
    - template: kserve-crd-v0-18-0
      name: kserve-crd
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: cert-manager
        namespace: jupyterhub
    - template: kserve-resources-v0-18-0
      name: kserve-resources
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: kserve-crd
        namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        kserve-resources:
          kserve:
            controller:
              deploymentMode: Standard # Knative
              gateway:
                disableIstioVirtualHost: true
                disableIngressCreation: true
    - template: kserve-runtime-configs-v0-18-0
      name: kserve-runtime-configs
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: kserve-resources
        namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        kserve-runtime-configs:
          kserve:
            servingruntime:
              enabled: true
    - template: raw-2-0-2
      name: raw
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: kserve-runtime-configs
        namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        raw:
          resources:
          - apiVersion: serving.kserve.io/v1beta1
            kind: InferenceService
            metadata:
              name: sklearn-iris
              namespace: kserve
            spec:
              predictor:
                model:
                  modelFormat:
                    name: sklearn
                  storageUri: gs://kfserving-examples/models/sklearn/1.0/model
                  resources:
                    requests:
                      cpu: "100m"
                      memory: "512Mi"
                    limits:
                      cpu: "1"
                      memory: "1Gi"
contentHtml:
Install template to k0rdent

helm upgrade --install jupyterhub oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=jupyterhub:4.3.5" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install traefik oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=traefik:39.0.8" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install ollama oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=ollama:1.54.0" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install cert-manager oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=cert-manager:1.20.2" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install kserve-crd oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=kserve-crd:v0.18.0" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install kserve-resources oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=kserve-resources:v0.18.0" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install kserve-runtime-configs oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=kserve-runtime-configs:v0.18.0" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install raw oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=raw:2.0.2" \
  -n kcm-system

Verify service template

kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   jupyterhub-4-3-5                true
# kcm-system   traefik-39-0-8                  true
# kcm-system   ollama-1-54-0                   true
# kcm-system   cert-manager-1-20-2             true
# kcm-system   kserve-crd-v0-18-0              true
# kcm-system   kserve-resources-v0-18-0        true
# kcm-system   kserve-runtime-configs-v0-18-0  true
# kcm-system   raw-2-0-2                       true

Deploy service template

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: jupyterhub
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: jupyterhub-4-3-5
      name: jupyterhub
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        jupyterhub:
          ingress:
            enabled: true
            hosts: ['']
    - template: traefik-39-0-8
      name: traefik
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443
    - template: ollama-1-54-0
      name: ollama
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        ollama:
          models:
            pull: [smollm:135m]
            run: [smollm:135m]
    - template: cert-manager-1-20-2
      name: cert-manager
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        cert-manager:
          crds:
            enabled: true
    - template: kserve-crd-v0-18-0
      name: kserve-crd
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: cert-manager
        namespace: jupyterhub
    - template: kserve-resources-v0-18-0
      name: kserve-resources
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: kserve-crd
        namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        kserve-resources:
          kserve:
            controller:
              deploymentMode: Standard # Knative
              gateway:
                disableIstioVirtualHost: true
                disableIngressCreation: true
    - template: kserve-runtime-configs-v0-18-0
      name: kserve-runtime-configs
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: kserve-resources
        namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        kserve-runtime-configs:
          kserve:
            servingruntime:
              enabled: true
    - template: raw-2-0-2
      name: raw
      namespace: jupyterhub
      dependsOn:
      - name: kserve-runtime-configs
        namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        raw:
          resources:
          - apiVersion: serving.kserve.io/v1beta1
            kind: InferenceService
            metadata:
              name: sklearn-iris
              namespace: kserve
            spec:
              predictor:
                model:
                  modelFormat:
                    name: sklearn
                  storageUri: gs://kfserving-examples/models/sklearn/1.0/model
                  resources:
                    requests:
                      cpu: "100m"
                      memory: "512Mi"
                    limits:
                      cpu: "1"
                      memory: "1Gi"
